_comments.design: MINIMAL CONFIG - only specifies WHICH entities and HOW to group them
_comments.emergent: Display names, icons, and value colors from EntityMetadataRegistry
_comments.minRole: Uses UserRole.priority from permission.dart (customer=1, technician=2, dispatcher=3, manager=4, admin=5)
_comments.groupBy: Field to group by for distribution chart (e.g., 'status')
_comments.schedule: Schedule visible to ALL roles - data filtering via backend RLS
_comments.scheduleFilters: roles: explicit list; minRole: minimum role; DRY: Customer=property/unit/status, Technician=none, Dispatcher+=technician
_comments.attentionBanner: Dispatcher+ attention banner - items needing immediate action
_comments.roleViews: Config-driven view types per role: log (customer history), schedule (tech assigned), operations (dispatcher+ center)
_comments.timeframes: Days to look back (30, 90, 365) or null for all time
